theorem: For components C_1,...,C_n with shared variables, if ∀i. ⋃_{j≠i} Guar(C_j) ⊆ Rely(C_i), then safety(Program) ⟹ ∧_i safety(C_i under Rely(C_i)). Conservative: may report false positives, never false negatives.
